subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath turned himself toward the Dayspring of Revelation and hath attained the presence of his Lord whilst in the prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی الذی اقبل الی مشرق الوحی و فاز بلقاء ربه اذ کان فی السجن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
